summary: Frontend acceptance for iter39 (VELA INVEST full acquisition rebuild). 75/75 tests pass: 61 feature checks + 14 regression. All 15 review_request items verified end-to-end on desktop (1920x1080) via Playwright. Verdict mapping rename PROCEED/WATCHLIST/PASS works (demo verdict shows PASS in coral, opener-verdict-preview chip 'VERDICT · PASS', final-verdict 'PASS at €137,080'). VELA Deal Score 8-card scorecard renders with all testids (location/price/yield/liquidity/renovation/tourism/negotiation/confidence); Location specifically reads '83/100 STRONG' (NaN bug fixed). Deal Roadmap renders 7 step cards (invest-roadmap-step-0..6); step-4-detail correctly reads 'Top risk: Estimated renovation burden: €18k–€26k' (undefined bug fixed). What To Do Next renders primary card 'Pass — re-engage if asking drops to €128,140', walkaway correctly hidden for PASS, 7 agent questions, 8 due-diligence items, PASS CTAs (find-better + alert) wired. Better Deal Finder visible for PASS with all 6 alternatives (lower_psqm, smaller_unit, renovated_elev, waterfront, distressed, newbuild) + find-cta. Tab bar has all 12 tabs in correct order (overview, deal-score, roadmap, next-move, potential, actions, financials, str-potential, renovation-plan, risk-flags, better-deals, final-verdict); clicking tabs scrolls to corresponding sections (verified scroll deltas for deal-score=877, roadmap=1414, next-move=1815, better-deals=8626, final-verdict=9753). Live Preview Mode on /invest works: 1.5s debounce after URL paste triggers invest-live-preview block, all 5 phases (invest-preview-phase-0..4) render and tick, 'LIVE PREVIEW READY' label shows, CTA button text auto-swaps from 'Analyze Investment' to 'OPEN ACQUISITION VERDICT'. Manual Assisted Analysis CTA visible and routes to /invest/asset/manual which skips cinematic and renders dashboard + EditInputsPanel directly. Cinematic flow at /invest/asset/demo: thinking phases → opener (verdict chip PASS) → continue button (3.5s wait honored) → dashboard. Regression on /, /pricing, /portfolio (auth-gated, expected), /operate all pass. Console errors: only the pre-existing benign /api/me 401 noise (carry-over from iter34+).
critical_code_review_comments: Both pre-fix bugs called out in the review_request are now invisible at runtime: invest-score-location renders '83 / 100 STRONG · Athens · design-led urban STR' (no NaN), invest-roadmap-step-4-detail renders 'Top risk: Estimated renovation burden: €18k–€26k' (no 'undefined'). Cause was confirmed in iter38-context: Location uses _market.median_adr, leverage flags use .label.

Live Preview Mode debounce of 1200ms + ~300ms ingest is well-tuned — phase chips animate cleanly and CTA text-swap is visually sharp. Caching of preview data on submit was not directly observable in this run (would require network instrumentation), but no duplicate ingest spinner was seen on form submit, suggesting cache hit path works.

InvestOpener continue button still uses opacity-0 + pointer-events-none until phase==='ready' (~3.2s after opener mount). Same testability nit as iter38 — recommend exposing phase==='ready' as a boolean attribute (e.g., data-ready='true') on invest-opener-continue-btn so test scripts can wait deterministically rather than hardcoded timeout.

PASS verdict correctly hides invest-next-walkaway (only PROCEED variant shows it). PROCEED + WATCHLIST verdict variants were not exercised in demo (which is hard-coded to PASS). Recommend adding two more demo asset routes (/invest/asset/demo-proceed, /invest/asset/demo-watchlist) so all three verdict UI states can be smoke-tested without user input.
Tab-bar count=12 verified, scroll-spy on click works for all sampled tabs. Sticky-header math (potential tab places HPV at top=110px) carried from iter38 — assumed unchanged.
/portfolio is auth-gated behind Sign in with Google — that's expected, not an iter39 regression. Test merely confirms route loads (sign-in card renders).

Pre-existing console 401 noise from /api/me probe still present (10 occurrences across navigations). Recommend wrapping the auth probe in try/catch or a silent fetch to suppress benign 401s — repeats every iter.
test_credentials: Demo routes — no auth needed. /portfolio requires Google sign-in (out of scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter39 verified — full INVEST acquisition rebuild ships clean. Key testable surfaces: (1) /invest landing — invest-url-input + 1200ms debounce → invest-live-preview with phases invest-preview-phase-0..4 → 'LIVE PREVIEW READY' label → CTA text 'OPEN ACQUISITION VERDICT' (swaps from 'Analyze Investment'). Manual CTA: invest-manual-cta='Manual Assisted Analysis™' → /invest/asset/manual. (2) /invest/asset/demo cinematic: invest-thinking-phase-0..6 → invest-opener (with invest-opener-verdict-preview='VERDICT · PASS', invest-opener-vela-index 71/100) → wait full 3.5-4s before clicking invest-opener-continue-btn → invest-dashboard. (3) Dashboard sections (in render order): invest-section-deal-score (composite 71/100, 8 cards: location 83 STRONG, price/yield/liquidity/renovation/tourism/negotiation/confidence) → invest-section-roadmap (7 steps invest-roadmap-step-0..6, step-4-detail='Top risk: Estimated renovation burden: €18k–€26k') → invest-section-next (invest-next-primary-card text 'Pass — re-engage if asking drops to €128,140', NO walkaway for PASS, invest-next-agent-questions 7 items, invest-next-due-diligence 8 items, PASS CTAs invest-next-cta-find-better + invest-next-cta-alert) → invest-section-better-deals (visible for PASS, 6 alts: lower_psqm/smaller_unit/renovated_elev/waterfront/distressed/newbuild + invest-better-deals-find-cta) → existing iter38 sections (verdict/hpv/wwvd/roi/comps/transformation/negotiation/max-buy/final-verdict). (4) invest-tab-bar has 12 tabs (overview/deal-score/roadmap/next-move/potential/actions/financials/str-potential/renovation-plan/risk-flags/better-deals/final-verdict), scroll-spy on click works. (5) invest-section-final-verdict shows 'PASS at €137,080' (was 'NEGOTIATE' pre-rename). (6) /invest/asset/manual skips cinematic, renders dashboard + edit inputs UI. (7) Console errors: only pre-existing /api/me 401 noise (10 across run) — benign. (8) Verdict variants: only PASS exercised via demo; PROCEED/WATCHLIST UI states not exercised — recommend demo-proceed / demo-watchlist routes for full coverage. (9) Live Preview cached-data-reuse on submit not directly observable from UI alone — would need network trace; no duplicate ingest spinner was seen, so cache hit path likely works.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Both pre-fix issues from smoke test (Location NaN, Risk Scored 'undefined') are confirmed resolved in this iter — Location renders '83 / 100 STRONG · Athens · design-led urban STR' and Roadmap step-4-detail renders 'Top risk: Estimated renovation burden: €18k–€26k'. Single ergonomic note carried from iter38: invest-opener-continue-btn opacity-0 + pointer-events-none until phase==='ready' (~3.2s after opener mount); test scripts must wait full 3.5-4s before clicking. Functional behavior is correct.
